title: 金鯱賞の後に・『運の尽き』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is utterly flummoxed by her
loss in the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with shock and tears, she fears that
both good fortune and the gods have abandoned
her. She begs me to free her from this nightmare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tears don't stop—not even when I tell her our
next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen.
